summary: Decided to implement OpenRouter integration with dynamic concurrency and cost estimation, adding centralized OpenRouterAPI class for model info, pricing, and rate limits; set 3 workers for free models (20 req/min limit) and 8 for paid models; added cost estimation display before extraction with confirmation prompt; implemented binary diff filtering to exclude non-text content from LLM processing; configured 3-tier extraction model setup (nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b:free primary, gemini-2.5-flash-lite fallback, gemini-3.1-pro synthesis); increased token budget from 15K to 100K for diff-heavy batches; added /commit fast mode to skip approval step.
